title: Front-half station warmth phase
summary: The station experience for beach and coastal-scrub players is thinner than inland. This wave adds one pass of station-side copy and board phrasing that makes the front-half biomes feel as guided and warm as the inland chapter.

execution_order.why_now: Beach and coastal-scrub feel underserved by the current station copy.
New players spend their early time in these biomes and should feel the season guiding them.
Ensure phrasing stays warm without becoming tutorial-heavy.

guardrails: No new station pages or surfaces.
Copy must stay compact and use existing field-notice seams.
Front-half warmth should complement, not repeat, guided onboarding copy.
Keep the active `Coastal Shelter` beat title unchanged; spend warmth in the summary plus note plus notice family instead.
